_doc: v14 Mechanism C — labeled corpus for the denial-pattern detector. Each entry has the response text, an `is_denial` ground-truth label, and the language tag. Required thresholds on this corpus when run with has_recent_tool_call=True: precision >= 0.95, recall >= 0.85. Add new entries (especially negative controls) when a false-positive or false-negative is observed in production.
